userText: In a way, AI help me improve my working efficiency.
correctedText: In a way, AI helps me work more efficiently.
generalAdvice: 你已经把短语、意思和整体句意都答对了。下一步重点是稳住第三人称单数，并优先用更自然的表达 like work more efficiently。

issues.note: 主语是 AI，后面要用 helps，不是 help。
issues.suggestion: 看到单数主语时，快速检查动词是否需要 -s：AI helps, the system works, the tool makes。

issues.note: improve my working efficiency 能懂，但更自然的是 work more efficiently，或 improve my work efficiency。
issues.suggestion: 表达“更高效地工作”时，优先想 work more efficiently。
